ux_issues.description: The fullContent field in messageComplete only contains the final text segment when the AI response spans multiple tool calls. In Step 3b, the AI gave medical facility info in an earlier text segment, but fullContent only showed the last segment asking about tweaking days. The intermediate medical info text was lost from fullContent.
ux_issues.suggestion: Ensure fullContent in messageComplete concatenates ALL text segments from the entire response, including text before and between tool calls.

ux_issues.description: The AI response in Step 3a contained repeated/duplicated text after the tool result. The AI said 'It seems there might have been a slight hiccup' and repeated its summary multiple times, appearing confused about whether the tool call had already succeeded.
ux_issues.suggestion: The tool loop continuation logic may be causing the AI to re-explain itself when it sees the tool_result. Consider tuning the continuation prompt to avoid redundant recaps.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: Medical facility question received a vague response due to web search being unavailable. The AI said 'I can't pull up real-time, specific hospital names' and gave only generic info about Costa Rica healthcare. While the web_search tool was correctly attempted, the fallback response lacked specific facility names that could have been provided from training data (e.g., Hospital San Carlos in Ciudad Quesada near Arenal, Hospital Quepos near Manuel Antonio).
ai_behavior_issues.context: Step 3b - asked about hospitals/clinics near Arenal and Manuel Antonio

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The AI performed very well as a family travel companion. Trip creation correctly captured destination, family details, and budget level. The 10-day itinerary was well-structured with age-appropriate activities, realistic drive times (4-5 hours Arenal to Manuel Antonio), and thoughtful touches like the Frog Pond for Noah and Sloth Spotting for Emma. Expert handoff to Isabel (nature + family specialist) was seamless and gave detailed, family-specific wildlife viewing advice. Companion mode was appropriately concise with practical real-time advice. The AI consistently remembered Noah cannot swim and avoided suggesting dangerous activities. Safety advice about frogs and insects was excellent. Minor issues: duplicated text in tool loop responses, and the medical facilities answer was too vague. Overall a genuinely useful planning experience for a family trip.
